title: Nami Leaves Orange Town With the Treasure
description: On pages 18–18, Orange Town deals with the aftermath of Buggy’s defeat, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami decide what they will carry away from the island.
scene: Buggy’s threat has been broken, but the town is still tense: the villagers, Mayor Boodle, Chouchou, and the Straw Hats all react to the damage left behind.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What? You left the treasure behind!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I gave you half of it didn't I!? That's five million bell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yeah, but since half of the village was destroyed it will take some money to repair it

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop it!! I can't swim!! If you want it so badly, go and take it back from them!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How could I do that!? If you ever do that again, you're dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If you ever do that again, you're dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Their new company- ion, Nami "The thief" has joined the journey and the two boats continue sailing on the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But they don't know that on the next island they land at, "The Forest judgement" awaits...

summary: The part closes the Orange Town conflict by shifting from combat to consequences: treasure, forgiveness, pride, and the Straw Hats’ departure.
